TNT.Sports.1.HD.uk.subtitle: Yankees @ Red Sox
TNT.Sports.1.HD.uk.description: Boston Red Sox v New York Yankees (Start-time 12.20am). Coverage of the American League match from Fenway Park, as the two rivals go head to head in the fourth and final game of the series. These sides last met in a three-match series in New York earlier on this month, although the contest was reduced to two games due to bad weather. Both teams picked up a victory each with the Red Sox winning the first match 5-3 before the Yankees fought back to win the second 6-1.

TNT.Sports.4.HD.uk.title: Live International T20 Cricket
TNT.Sports.4.HD.uk.subtitle: Ireland v India-2nd T20
TNT.Sports.4.HD.uk.description: Ireland v India. Coverage of the second and final T20 in the series from Stormont Cricket Ground in Belfast. Coming into this series the visitors had won all eight of their matches in this format against Ireland, with the first game being played back in 2009. The last time they met before this set of matches was at the 2024 T20 World Cup, as India won a group match by eight wickets in New York.

TNT.Sports.4.HD.uk.title: Live Test Cricket
TNT.Sports.4.HD.uk.subtitle: West Indies v Sri Lanka-1st Test, Day Four
TNT.Sports.4.HD.uk.description: West Indies v Sri Lanka. Coverage of the fourth day of the First Test in the two-match series from Sir Vivian Richards Stadium in Antigua. The hosts haven't won the first game in a series against Sri Lanka since an impressive 226-run win over them in a three-match contest back in June 2018. West Indies made scores of 414-8 declared and 223-7 declared in their two innings as they bowled their visitors out for 185 and 226 to claim a well-earned victory.

Other hosts include Adnan Virk and Jon Sciambi.

ABC.National.Feed.us2.title: What Would You Do?
ABC.National.Feed.us2.description: Using hidden cameras, host John Quiñones observes and comments on how ordinary people behave when they are confronted with dilemmas that require them either to take action or to walk by and mind their own business. Various scenarios are created that force people to make split-second -- and often surprising -- decisions, and variations of the situation (such as changing the genders, races or clothing of the people involved) are often featured to see if different reactions are elicited. Examples of situations on the show include a waitress being harassed by her boss, and a drunken valet trying to park cars.

ABC.National.Feed.us2.subtitle: Murder at the U
ABC.National.Feed.us2.description: When a college student is murdered, his mother questions whether the police have done enough to solve the case; an ESPN investigation reveals police have an unlikely suspect.

ABC.National.Feed.us2.description: Emmy-winning funnyman Jimmy Kimmel serves up comedy bits and welcomes guests that include other comics, celebrities, athletes and musicians, as well as everyday people with unusual or compelling personal stories. Kimmel's family and friends take part in the festivities, including his Cousin Sal, Uncle Frank (until his death in 2011) and childhood friend Cleto Escobedo III, who leads the show's house band. Recurring segments include the FCC-pleasing This Week in Unnecessary Censorship in which they take TV clips and "bleep and blur things whether they need it or not," as Kimmel describes it. HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: As her arena tour debut looms, a pop star finds herself caught inside the afterglow of a breakout summer under the mounting pressure of what it costs to stay on top.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Magic Mike's Last Dance
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Mike Lane takes to the stage once again when a business deal that went bust leaves him broke and bartending in Florida. Hoping for one last hurrah, Mike heads to London with a wealthy socialite who lures him with an offer he can't refuse -- and an agenda all her own. With everything on the line, he soon finds himself trying to whip a hot new roster of talented dancers into shape.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Superman: The Movie
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Just before the destruction of the planet Krypton, scientist Jor-El (Marlon Brando) sends his infant son Kal-El on a spaceship to Earth. Raised by kindly farmers Jonathan (Glenn Ford) and Martha Kent (Phyllis Thaxter), young Clark (Christopher Reeve) discovers the source of his superhuman powers and moves to Metropolis to fight evil. As Superman, he battles the villainous Lex Luthor (Gene Hackman), while, as novice reporter Clark Kent, he attempts to woo co-worker Lois Lane (Margot Kidder).

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Superman II
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Superman (Christopher Reeve) foils the plot of terrorists by hurtling their nuclear device into outer space, but the bomb's shock waves free the Kryptonian villain General Zod (Terence Stamp) and his henchmen Ursa (Sarah Douglas) and Non (Jack O'Halloran) from their imprisonment. Traveling to Earth, they threaten the planet with destruction at the same time that Superman decides to renounce his superpowers in order to live a normal life as Clark Kent with his new love, Lois Lane (Margot Kidder).

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Superman III
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Computer programmer Gus Gorman (Richard Pryor) is hired by financial tycoon Ross Webster (Robert Vaughn) to seize control of a weather satellite and annihilate Colombia's coffee crop. When Superman (Christopher Reeve) manages to thwart the plan, Webster commands Gorman to use the satellite to locate kryptonite, the Man of Steel's mortal weakness. But a missing unknown element in the kryptonite -- replaced by Gorman with tar -- causes an unintended side effect when presented to Superman.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Superman IV: The Quest for Peace
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Seeing the United States and the Soviet Union engaged in a nuclear arms race that could lead to Earth's destruction, Superman (Christopher Reeve) decides that he must take action. He collects all the nuclear warheads from the world and throws them into space. Meanwhile, Superman's nemesis, Lex Luthor (Gene Hackman), has broken out of prison with a new scheme. He clones Superman with radioactive material to create Nuclear Man (Mark Pillow), a being just as powerful as the man of steel.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Superman Returns
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: While Lex Luthor plots to destroy him once and for all, the Man of Steel returns after a long absence to a much-changed world. Lois Lane has moved on with her life, and society has learned to survive without him. Superman must find a way to reconnect with her and find his place in a world that may no longer need him.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Man of Steel
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: With the imminent destruction of Krypton, their home planet, Jor-El (Russell Crowe) and his wife seek to preserve their race by sending their infant son to Earth. The child's spacecraft lands at the farm of Jonathan (Kevin Costner) and Martha (Diane Lane) Kent, who name him Clark and raise him as their own son. Though his extraordinary abilities have led to the adult Clark (Henry Cavill) living on the fringe of society, he finds he must become a hero to save those he loves from a dire threat.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Superman
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: When Superman gets drawn into conflicts at home and abroad, his actions are questioned, giving tech billionaire Lex Luthor the opportunity to get the Man of Steel out of the way for good. Will intrepid reporter Lois Lane and Superman's four-legged companion, Krypto, be able to help him before it's too late?

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Barbie

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Life of Pi
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: After deciding to sell their zoo in India and move to Canada, Santosh and Gita Patel board a freighter with their sons and a few remaining animals. Tragedy strikes when a terrible storm sinks the ship, leaving the Patels' teenage son, Pi, as the only human survivor. However, Pi is not alone; a fearsome Bengal tiger has also found refuge aboard the lifeboat. As days turn into weeks and weeks drag into months, Pi and the tiger must learn to trust each other if both are to survive.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Final Destination Bloodlines

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Prometheus
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: The discovery of a clue to mankind's origins on Earth leads a team of explorers to the darkest parts of the universe. Two brilliant young scientists lead the expedition. Shaw hopes that they will meet a race of benevolent, godlike beings who will in some way verify her religious beliefs, while Holloway is out to debunk any spiritual notions. However, neither the scientists nor their shipmates are prepared for the unimaginable terrors that await them.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Alien: Covenant

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Martin Lawrence: You So Crazy
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Filmed at a sold-out Majestic Theater in Brooklyn, N.Y., comedian Martin Lawrence delivers his first full-length stand-up special. Harking back to Eddie Murphy, the leather-clad comic riffs on drugs, jail, his impoverished upbringing with his mother and his luck -- or lack thereof -- with women. He also speaks at length about racism and the Rodney King ruling and subsequent riots. Lawrence even offers his unique perspective on how to maintain a successful relationship.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Lobster

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Superman Returns

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Suicide Squad

Armed with high-tech weapons, they trek through the dangerous jungle on a search-and-destroy mission, with only Col. Rick Flag on the ground to make them behave.

With everything on the line, he soon finds himself trying to whip a hot new roster of talented dancers into shape.

With her husband urging her to fight for equal pay, the private King was also struggling to come to terms with her own sexuality, while Riggs gambled his legacy and reputation in a bid to relive the glories of his past.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Bring Me the Beauties

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Wuthering Heights

Hosts Sara Gore and George Oliphant (who also rescues homeowners' renovation projects on sister show "George to the Rescue," which began as a segment of "Open House" before becoming a stand-alone show) showcase some of the hottest homes on the market in major cities, get interior design tips from experts and provide information on what people need to know about stylish living.

CNN.HD.us2.title: This Land
CNN.HD.us2.subtitle: Lone Star Border
CNN.HD.us2.description: The 1836 Battle of the Alamo becomes a rallying cry for the Texas Revolution, culminating in the U.S. seizing vast territory from Mexico. As decades pass, the nation grows by nearly a third, reshaping North America and its balance of power.

CNN.HD.us2.title: When Soccer Came to America
CNN.HD.us2.description: Years before the MLS, the U.S. was seduced by the North American Soccer League, featuring international stars like Pele and George Best. With glitz, glamour and the world's greatest players, this was soccer's wild child league, which soared to colossal heights, only to implode on itself.

CNN.HD.us2.title: This Land
CNN.HD.us2.subtitle: Empire Island
CNN.HD.us2.description: Against impossible odds, DeWitt Clinton launches a plan to reshape the landscape of New York state and transform it into a global trading superpower, sparking conflict between the Gilded Age elite and the immigrant poor.

Soon, Colt meets Lizzie Bradbury (Kirsten Dunst), a beautiful American tennis player with an upcoming match of her own, and finds the inspiration he hopes will turn his luck around.

Pitted against colossal, prehistoric sharks and relentless environmental plunderers, they must outrun, outsmart and outswim their merciless predators.

When the facility's backers send an executive to investigate the experiments, a routine procedure goes awry and a shark starts attacking the researchers. Now, with sharks outnumbering their human captors, McAlester and her team must figure out a way to stop them from escaping to the ocean and breeding.

Now, David's in big debt to his supplier and to wipe the slate clean, he must go to Mexico to pick up the guy's latest shipment. To accomplish his mission, Dave devises a foolproof plan: He packs a fake family into a huge RV and heads south of the border for a wild weekend that is sure to end with a bang.

TBS.HD.us2.title: Father of the Bride

From meeting the in-laws to wedding plans with an over-the-top consultant (Martin Short) and his flamboyant assistant (B.D. Wong), it seems as if the troubles never end in this update of the classic Spencer Tracy comedy.

TBS.HD.us2.title: Father of the Bride Part II
TBS.HD.us2.description: Just when George Banks (Steve Martin) has gotten used to his daughter, Annie (Kimberly Williams), being married, she announces that she's pregnant, making him an impending grandfather. Shaken by nearing this new milestone in his life, George soon has to process even more surprising news -- his wife, Nina (Diane Keaton), is pregnant too. Reeling from these revelations, George gets help from the eccentric Franck (Martin Short), who, conveniently, has moved from planning weddings to baby showers.

TBS.HD.us2.title: Wonder Woman 1984

Though she's come into her full powers, she maintains a low profile by curating ancient artifacts, and only performing heroic acts incognito. But soon, Diana will have to muster all of her strength, wisdom and courage as she finds herself squaring off against Maxwell Lord and the Cheetah, a villainess who possesses superhuman strength and agility.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Top Gun
AMC.HD.us2.description: The Top Gun Naval Fighter Weapons School is where the best of the best train to refine their elite flying skills. When hotshot fighter pilot Maverick (Tom Cruise) is sent to the school, his reckless attitude and cocky demeanor put him at odds with the other pilots, especially the cool and collected Iceman (Val Kilmer). But Maverick isn't only competing to be the top fighter pilot, he's also fighting for the attention of his beautiful flight instructor, Charlotte Blackwood (Kelly McGillis).

AMC.HD.us2.title: Jerry Maguire
AMC.HD.us2.description: When slick sports agent Jerry Maguire (Tom Cruise) has a crisis of conscience, he pens a heartfelt company-wide memo that promptly gets him fired. Desperate to hang on to the athletes that he represents, Jerry starts his own management firm, with only single mother Dorothy Boyd (Renee Zellweger) joining him in his new venture. Banking on their sole client, football player Rod Tidwell (Cuba Gooding Jr.), Jerry and Dorothy begin to fall in love as they struggle to make their business work.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Apollo 13
AMC.HD.us2.description: This Hollywood drama is based on the events of the Apollo 13 lunar mission, astronauts Jim Lovell (Tom Hanks), Fred Haise (Bill Paxton) and Jack Swigert (Kevin Bacon) find everything going according to plan after leaving Earth's orbit. However, when an oxygen tank explodes, the scheduled moon landing is called off. Subsequent tensions within the crew and numerous technical problems threaten both the astronauts' survival and their safe return to Earth.

AMC.HD.us2.title: True Lies
AMC.HD.us2.description: Secretly a spy but thought by his family to be a dull salesman, Harry Tasker (Arnold Schwarzenegger) is tracking down nuclear missiles in the possession of Islamic jihadist Aziz (Art Malik). Harry's mission is complicated when he realizes his neglected wife, Helen (Jamie Lee Curtis), is contemplating an affair with Simon (Bill Paxton), a used-car salesman who claims he's a spy. When Aziz kidnaps Harry and Helen, the secret agent must save the world and patch up his marriage at the same time.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Top Gun
AMC.HD.us2.description: The Top Gun Naval Fighter Weapons School is where the best of the best train to refine their elite flying skills. When hotshot fighter pilot Maverick (Tom Cruise) is sent to the school, his reckless attitude and cocky demeanor put him at odds with the other pilots, especially the cool and collected Iceman (Val Kilmer). AMC.HD.us2.title: Independence Day
AMC.HD.us2.description: In the epic adventure film "Independence Day," strange phenomena surface around the globe. The skies ignite. Terror races through the world's major cities. As these extraordinary events unfold, it becomes increasingly clear that a force of incredible magnitude has arrived; its mission: total annihilation over the Fourth of July weekend. The last hope to stop the destruction is an unlikely group of people united by fate and unimaginable circumstances.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Star Wars: A New Hope
AMC.HD.us2.description: The Imperial Forces -- under orders from cruel Darth Vader (David Prowse) -- hold Princess Leia (Carrie Fisher) hostage, in their efforts to quell the rebellion against the Galactic Empire. Luke Skywalker (Mark Hamill) and Han Solo (Harrison Ford), captain of the Millennium Falcon, work together with the companionable droid duo R2-D2 (Kenny Baker) and C-3PO (Anthony Daniels) to rescue the beautiful princess, help the Rebel Alliance, and restore freedom and justice to the Galaxy.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back
AMC.HD.us2.description: The adventure continues in this "Star Wars" sequel. Luke Skywalker (Mark Hamill), Han Solo (Harrison Ford), Princess Leia (Carrie Fisher) and Chewbacca (Peter Mayhew) face attack by the Imperial forces and its AT-AT walkers on the ice planet Hoth. While Han and Leia escape in the Millennium Falcon, Luke travels to Dagobah in search of Yoda. Only with the Jedi master's help will Luke survive when the dark side of the Force beckons him into the ultimate duel with Darth Vader (David Prowse).

AMC.HD.us2.title: Star Wars: Return of the Jedi
AMC.HD.us2.description: Luke Skywalker (Mark Hamill) battles horrible Jabba the Hutt and cruel Darth Vader to save his comrades in the Rebel Alliance and triumph over the Galactic Empire. Han Solo (Harrison Ford) and Princess Leia (Carrie Fisher) reaffirm their love and team with Chewbacca, Lando Calrissian (Billy Dee Williams), the Ewoks and the androids C-3PO and R2-D2 to aid in the disruption of the Dark Side and the defeat of the evil emperor.

That peace is shattered when Gabriel Cortez, a vicious crime lord, escapes from FBI custody and speeds toward Ray's town with a band of mercenaries. Federal agents prepare to capture Cortez. Ray is at first reluctant to get involved, but he soon finds he must rally his team and take matters into his own hands.

AMC.HD.us2.description: Just-paroled army ranger Cameron Poe (Nicolas Cage) is headed back to his wife (Monica Potter), but must fly home aboard a prison transport flight dubbed "Jailbird" with some of the worst criminals living. Along with Diamond Dog (Ving Rhames) and Baby-O (Mykelti Williamson), genius serial killer Cyrus "The Virus" Grissom (John Malkovich) unleashes a violent escape plot in mid-flight. Secretly working with U.S. Marshall Vince Larkin (John Cusack), Poe tries to foil Grissom's plan.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Captain America: The First Avenger
AMC.HD.us2.description: It is 1941 and the world is in the throes of war. Steve Rogers (Chris Evans) wants to do his part and join America's armed forces, but the military rejects him because of his small stature. Finally, Steve gets his chance when he is accepted into an experimental program that turns him into a supersoldier called Captain America. Joining forces with Bucky Barnes (Sebastian Stan) and Peggy Carter (Hayley Atwell), Captain America leads the fight against the Nazi-backed HYDRA organization.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Captain America: Civil War
AMC.HD.us2.description: Political pressure mounts to install a system of accountability when the actions of the Avengers lead to collateral damage. The new status quo deeply divides members of the team. Captain America (Chris Evans) believes superheroes should remain free to defend humanity without government interference. Iron Man (Robert Downey Jr.) sharply disagrees and supports oversight. As the debate escalates into an all-out feud, Black Widow (Scarlett Johansson) and Hawkeye (Jeremy Renner) must pick a side.

AMC.HD.us2.description: The Griswolds are off on a family outing to Las Vegas, where they each have their own misadventures. Hapless dad Clark Griswold immediately starts losing money at blackjack, while his wife, Ellen, develops a crush on lounge performer Wayne Newton. Elsewhere, young Rusty is enthusiastically playing dice, and his sister, Audrey, winds up in seedy nightclubs. Can the family reunite and stay out of trouble?

AMC.HD.us2.title: American Gangster
AMC.HD.us2.description: Frank Lucas earns his living as a chauffeur to one of Harlem's leading mobsters. After his boss dies, Frank uses his own ingenuity and strict business code to become one of the inner city's most powerful crime bosses. Veteran cop Richie Roberts senses a change in the mob's power structure and looks for ways to bring his opponent to justice.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Captain America: Civil War
AMC.HD.us2.description: Political pressure mounts to install a system of accountability when the actions of the Avengers lead to collateral damage. The new status quo deeply divides members of the team. Captain America (Chris Evans) believes superheroes should remain free to defend humanity without government interference. Iron Man (Robert Downey Jr.) sharply disagrees and supports oversight. As the debate escalates into an all-out feud, Black Widow (Scarlett Johansson) and Hawkeye (Jeremy Renner) must pick a side.

AMC.HD.us2.title: National Treasure
AMC.HD.us2.description: Historian and code-breaker Ben Gates (Nicolas Cage) has been searching his whole life for a rumored treasure dating back to the creation of the United States. Joining an expedition led by fellow treasure hunter Ian Howe (Sean Bean), Gates finds an ice-locked Colonial ship in the Arctic Circle that contains a clue linking the treasure to the Declaration of Independence. But when Howe betrays him, Gates has to race to get to the document ahead of his so-called colleague.

AMC.HD.us2.title: National Treasure: Book of Secrets
AMC.HD.us2.description: When a long-missing page from the diary of assassin John Wilkes Booth suddenly resurfaces, it implicates the great-great-grandfather of treasure hunter Ben Gates (Nicolas Cage) as a conspirator in Lincoln's death. Ben's globetrotting quest to prove his ancestor's innocence leads him to a closely guarded book containing the nation's deepest secrets.

AMC.HD.us2.title: White House Down
AMC.HD.us2.description: Capitol police officer John Cale has just been denied his dream job of protecting President James Sawyer as a member of the Secret Service. Not wanting to disappoint his young daughter with the bad news, Cale takes her on a tour of the White House. While he and his daughter are there, a heavily armed paramilitary group attacks and seizes control. As the nation's government dissolves in chaos, only Cale can save his daughter, the president and the country.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Dirigida al lesbianismo; La mata y le saca dinero
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Lola y Helena están casadas y discuten sobre la educación sexual de su hija. Zoe espera que su madre se pudra en prisión por matar a su hermana y demanda al fotógrafo que negocia con las fotos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Quítale la licencia; Homofóbico enamorado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Le pide a su padre que entregue su licencia de conducir porque se comporta de forma agresiva cuando maneja. José no acepta que le gusta tener relaciones con hombres, por eso los golpea.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Hablar de los problemas es el primer paso para superarlos y, por eso, Rocío trae un programa único para hablar de las preocupaciones de cada día y, en conjunto, encontrar una solución.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Lo que callamos las mujeres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Pía: No me olvides
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Pía, tras ser diagnosticada con Alzheimer, quiere demostrar que está bien, pero su trastorno avanza. En un momento de lucidez le pide a un amigo que, a su muerte, done su cerebro a la ciencia.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: La Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026 con 48 selecciones en 104 partidos durante 39 días en Estados Unidos, México y Canadá. Revive juegos completos, momentos destacados y más.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Mundial
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.subtitle: Uruguay-España
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: El Mundial más grande de la historia ya está aquí. La gran cita de selecciones de la FIFA cuenta por primera vez con 48 equipos en busca de la gloria. Estados Unidos, México y Canadá se convierten en el epicentro del planeta fútbol del 11 de junio al 19 de julio.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: DAZN Mundial
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: La extensa cobertura de DAZN en el Mundial cuenta con una prolongada previa sobre lo que va a ocurrir durante la jornada. El canal cuenta con periodistas desplazados hasta Norteamérica para acercar al espectador a todo lo que ocurre durante la Copa del Mundo.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Buenos días América
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Durante el Mundial, este espacio toma el pulso a todo lo acontecido en Norteamérica en la gran cita de Selecciones del año. Las mejores imágenes de los partidos y el análisis para empezar el día informado de lo que ha acontecido durante la madrugada.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Revelado - Luis de la Fuente
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Luis de la Fuente entró sin hacer ruido en el banquillo de la Selección, pero ha conseguido impregnar un sello propio al equipo nacional de España. Con él se han logrado Liga de Naciones y Eurocopa y ahora afronta el reto más complicado: el Mundial.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Mundial
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.subtitle: Noruega-Francia
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: El Mundial más grande de la historia ya está aquí. La gran cita de selecciones de la FIFA cuenta por primera vez con 48 equipos en busca de la gloria. Estados Unidos, México y Canadá se convierten en el epicentro del planeta fútbol del 11 de junio al 19 de julio.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: La Dazoneta
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: El equipo de La Dazoneta se pone en modo Mundial. Un análisis de todo lo que acontezca en la gran cita del verano, la Copa Mundial de la FIFA.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Mundial - Highlights del día
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Un repaso rápido a los mejores momentos del Mundial.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Neymar, dinastía de reyes
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: La unión del pueblo brasileño con el fútbol es de las conexiones más fuertes de la historia del deporte. En cada generación han disfrutado de una estrella sobre el césped, como una dinastía en la que los grandes futbolistas del país se van pasando la corona.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Resúmenes Mundial
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Los encuentros del Mundial 2026 comprimidos en pocos minutos para no perderse nada de lo que ocurra en la cita de Estados Unidos, México y Canadá.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: El Mundial es tendencia. La gran cita de selecciones de la FIFA es, sin duda, el torneo global más seguido del planeta y, por tanto, deja momentos muy comentados.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Stories From The Cities
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Un espacio que recorre las ciudades sede de Estados Unidos, México y Canadá. En lugar de enfocarse únicamente en los estadios, el show explora la cultura local, la gastronomía, la música, la gente y el arraigo del fútbol base (fútbol comunitario) en cada una de ellas.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Maradona: The Fall
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: En el Mundial de 1994, saltó el escándalo. Diego Maradona, icono del fútbol, dio positivo en un control antidoping y fue expulsado de la selección argentina. Este trabajo documental repasa el momento más duro en la carrera futbolística del astro de Lanús.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Green Lions
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Cuando Camerún derrotó a la actual campeona del mundo, Argentina, en el partido inaugural de Italia '90, fue, posiblemente, la mayor sorpresa de la historia de los Mundiales. Pero eso fue sólo el principio.

Ziggo.Sport.2.nl.title: Kick 't Met On Tour
Ziggo.Sport.2.nl.subtitle: Wat een Europa League finale in Istanbul!
Ziggo.Sport.2.nl.description: In een nieuwe aflevering van Kick 't Met On Tour: de Europa League-finale in Istanbul! De seizoensafsluiter was er eentje! De Europa League-finale tussen Aston Villa en SC Freiburg. Prachtige goals, prachtige sfeer en een verdiende winnaar. Gesprekken met legendes als Marc Desailly tot de winnaars Ian Maatsen, Amadou Onana en Youri Tielemans. Een finale die we niet snel zullen vergeten.

Ziggo.Sport.2.nl.title: KICK 't MET
Ziggo.Sport.2.nl.subtitle: Interview: Kenneth Taylor
Ziggo.Sport.2.nl.description: Kenneth Taylor blikt openhartig terug op zijn overstap van zijn vertrouwde 'warm bad' bij Ajax naar Serie A-topclub Lazio Roma. Hij bespreekt de tactische cultuurschok in Italië, het uiteenvallen van zijn Amsterdamse vriendengroep en de waardevolle lessen die hij meekreeg van Francesco Farioli. Tot slot laat de ambitieuze middenvelder er geen misverstand over bestaan: een toekomstige terugkeer naar zijn grote liefde Ajax sluit hij absoluut niet uit.

Ziggo.Sport.2.nl.title: Wes & Raf
Ziggo.Sport.2.nl.subtitle: Op De Eindtoernooien
Ziggo.Sport.2.nl.description: In aflevering 3 van Wes & Raf blikken Wesley Sneijder en Rafael van der Vaart samen met Noa Vahle terug op hun gezamenlijke jaren in het Nederlands elftal. Van onvergetelijke hoogtepunten op eindtoernooien tot de teleurstellingen die Oranje ook kende: alles komt voorbij. Hoe bijzonder is het om het Oranje-shirt te dragen en je land te vertegenwoordigen op het hoogste podium? En hoe kon het dat Oranje na het magische WK van 2010 twee jaar later zo teleurstellend presteerde op het EK van 2012?

Ziggo.Sport.3.nl.title: Hall of Fame dinner
Ziggo.Sport.3.nl.description: Voor het eerst schuiven zeven MotoGP Hall of Fame-leden samen aan tafel. Giacomo Agostini, Valentino Rossi, Jorge Lorenzo, Casey Stoner, Freddie Spencer, Kevin Schwantz en Dani Pedrosa, samen goed voor 23 wereldtitels in de koningsklasse, komen samen voor een besloten diner met enkele van de grootste namen uit de geschiedenis van de sport. En wanneer deze iconen beginnen te praten, is dat goud waard.

Ziggo.Sport.5.nl.title: All Blacks In Their Own Words
Ziggo.Sport.5.nl.subtitle: Eerlijkheid
Ziggo.Sport.5.nl.description: Nu het team na de Ierse serie steeds meer onder de loep werd genomen, voerde hoofdcoach Ian Foster radicale veranderingen door in zijn coachingteam en haalde aanvalscoach Jason Ryan van de Crusaders. Ryans nuchtere aanpak hielp het lot van de All Blacks in Afrika te veranderen, maar de wittebroodsweken waren van korte duur.

Ziggo.Sport.5.nl.subtitle: Vriendschap
Ziggo.Sport.5.nl.description: De All Blacks sluiten het seizoen af met vier tests in evenveel weken in Japan en het Verenigd Koninkrijk. Beleef het team terwijl ze de bindende kracht van de haka ontdekken en deel de intieme momenten van het leven onderweg met een team dat op zoek is naar de perfecte afsluiting van een tumultueus jaar.

Ziggo.Sport.nl.title: Kick 't Met On Tour
Ziggo.Sport.nl.subtitle: Wat een Europa League finale in Istanbul!
Ziggo.Sport.nl.description: In een nieuwe aflevering van Kick 't Met On Tour: de Europa League-finale in Istanbul! De seizoensafsluiter was er eentje! De Europa League-finale tussen Aston Villa en SC Freiburg. Prachtige goals, prachtige sfeer en een verdiende winnaar. Gesprekken met legendes als Marc Desailly tot de winnaars Ian Maatsen, Amadou Onana en Youri Tielemans. Een finale die we niet snel zullen vergeten.

Ziggo.Sport.nl.title: Wes & Raf
Ziggo.Sport.nl.subtitle: Op De Eindtoernooien
Ziggo.Sport.nl.description: In aflevering 3 van Wes & Raf blikken Wesley Sneijder en Rafael van der Vaart samen met Noa Vahle terug op hun gezamenlijke jaren in het Nederlands elftal. Van onvergetelijke hoogtepunten op eindtoernooien tot de teleurstellingen die Oranje ook kende: alles komt voorbij. Hoe bijzonder is het om het Oranje-shirt te dragen en je land te vertegenwoordigen op het hoogste podium? En hoe kon het dat Oranje na het magische WK van 2010 twee jaar later zo teleurstellend presteerde op het EK van 2012?

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: (L) UFC Fight Night: Fiziev vs. Torres - Main
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: All-action lightweights headline UFC's return to Baku, Azerbaijan on Saturday, June 27 as Rafael “Ataman” Fiziev and Manuel “El Loco” Torres meet in the main event at the National Gymnastics Arena. A rankings mainstay for the last several years, Fiziev, who represents Azerbaijan inside the Octagon, makes his second appearance in Baku after earning a unanimous decision win over Ignacio Bahamondes last year.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Countdown - UFC 315: Muhammad vs Della Maddalena
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: UFC 315 Countdown takes an inside look at two title fights, as welterweight king Belal Muhammad attempts to defend his crown against Jack Della Maddalena, and flyweight queen Valentina Shevchenko puts her belt on the line against Manon Fiorot.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Freedom 250: Topuria vs. Gaethje - Main
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: On Sunday, June 15, the Octagon comes to Washington, D.C. as UFC Freedom 250 brings a star-studded lineup to The White House. In the main event, undefeated lightweight champion Ilia “El Matador” Topuria faces off with interim titleholder Justin “The Highlight” Gaethje to determine who is the undisputed best in the 155-pound weight class. In the co-main event, former middleweight and light heavyweight champion Alex “Poatan” Pereira looks to become the first fighter to hold UFC gold in three weight classes as he squares off with Ciryl “Bon Gamin” Gane in a clash for the interim UFC heavyweight title.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: TM ISTAF World Cup 2026 - Group - MYANMAR vs MALAYSIA - (TEAM)
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: The ISTAF Sepaktakraw World Cup 2026 marks the official return of the Sepaktakraw World Cup to Malaysia, reaffirming the nation's historic and enduring role in the global development of the sport. This prestigious championship will be held from 16 to 23 May 2026 in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: Mencari Ramli Musim Ke - 3 - 6
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: Mencari Ramli adalah program pencarian bakat bola sepak yang hebat. Program ini memberi peluang kepada bakat muda untuk merealisasikan impian mereka menjadi pemain bola sepak terbaik di peringkat kebangsaan dan antarabangsa. Program ini mencungkil bakat bola sepak anak-anak muda berusia bawah 14 tahun dan bawah 16 tahun.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: Sensasi Bola - 13
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: Sensasi Bola merupakan satu program bual bicara berdurasi setengah jam bersama pemain bola sepak, selebriti, jurulatih dan peminat sebagai tetamu undangan setiap minggu. Antara topik menarik yang akan dikupas adalah isu mengenai bola sepak tempatan dan antarabangsa, temubual ekslusif bersama lagenda bola sepak, tips kesihatan serta isu semasa yang menjadi perbualan masa kini.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Fight Flashback - 1101 - Gaethje vs Holloway
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: UFC 300 was not only a milestone event for the world's leading MMA organization but featured a highly anticipated bout between Justin Gaethje and Max Holloway as they battled for the “BMF” belt and the title of the “baddest” fighter on the planet. See their fight like never seen before with enhanced replays and angles, new footage, and exclusive audio.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Reloaded - UFC 312: Du Plessis vs Strickland
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: UFC returns down under to Sydney, Austalia, where Middleweight champion Dricus Du Plessis defends his crown against Sean Strickland, the man he took it from, and undefeated TUF 23 winner Tatiana Suarez aims to unseat 2-time champion Zhang Weili for the Women's Strawweight title. Plus more on UFC Reloaded!

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Fight Night: Kape vs. Horiguchi - Main
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: A crucial matchup between flyweight contenders headlines UFC's return to action at the Meta APEX in Las Vegas on Saturday, June 21 as second-ranked contender Manel “Starboy” Kape faces off with fifthranked Kyoji Horiguchi. A winner of seven of his last eight appearances and each of his last three outings, Kape makes his 2026 debut off a first-round knockout win over former title challenger Brandon Royval last December in the same building. A title challenger during his first stint with the promotion, Horiuchi has earned back-to-back wins since returning to the UFC last November and looks to cement his standing as a contender with a third straight standout performance.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: Mencari Ramli Musim Ke - 3 - 6
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: Mencari Ramli adalah program pencarian bakat bola sepak yang hebat. Program ini memberi peluang kepada bakat muda untuk merealisasikan impian mereka menjadi pemain bola sepak terbaik di peringkat kebangsaan dan antarabangsa. Program ini mencungkil bakat bola sepak anak-anak muda berusia bawah 14 tahun dan bawah 16 tahun.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: Sensasi Bola - 13
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: Sensasi Bola merupakan satu program bual bicara berdurasi setengah jam bersama pemain bola sepak, selebriti, jurulatih dan peminat sebagai tetamu undangan setiap minggu. Antara topik menarik yang akan dikupas adalah isu mengenai bola sepak tempatan dan antarabangsa, temubual ekslusif bersama lagenda bola sepak, tips kesihatan serta isu semasa yang menjadi perbualan masa kini.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Fight Flashback - 1101 - Gaethje vs Holloway
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: UFC 300 was not only a milestone event for the world's leading MMA organization but featured a highly anticipated bout between Justin Gaethje and Max Holloway as they battled for the “BMF” belt and the title of the “baddest” fighter on the planet. See their fight like never seen before with enhanced replays and angles, new footage, and exclusive audio.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Reloaded - UFC 312: Du Plessis vs Strickland
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: UFC returns down under to Sydney, Austalia, where Middleweight champion Dricus Du Plessis defends his crown against Sean Strickland, the man he took it from, and undefeated TUF 23 winner Tatiana Suarez aims to unseat 2-time champion Zhang Weili for the Women's Strawweight title. Plus more on UFC Reloaded!

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Ultimate Knockouts - 1002 - Ultimate Knockouts "Welterweights
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: UFC Ultimate Knockouts brings you a collection of the best welterweight KOs.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Countdown - UFC 315: Muhammad vs Della Maddalena
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: UFC 315 Countdown takes an inside look at two title fights, as welterweight king Belal Muhammad attempts to defend his crown against Jack Della Maddalena, and flyweight queen Valentina Shevchenko puts her belt on the line against Manon Fiorot.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: LALIGA TOP GOALS MIGUEL DE LAS CUEVAS - LALIGA TOP GOALS MIGUEL DE LAS CUEVAS
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: Some of the best goals from Miguel de las Cuevas during his time at Sporting Gijon.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Fight Night: Fiziev vs. Torres - Main
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: All-action lightweights headline UFC's return to Baku, Azerbaijan on Saturday, June 27 as Rafael “Ataman” Fiziev and Manuel “El Loco” Torres meet in the main event at the National Gymnastics Arena. A rankings mainstay for the last several years, Fiziev, who represents Azerbaijan inside the Octagon, makes his second appearance in Baku after earning a unanimous decision win over Ignacio Bahamondes last year.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: LALIGA TOP GOALS MIGUEL DE LAS CUEVAS - LALIGA TOP GOALS MIGUEL DE LAS CUEVAS
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: Some of the best goals from Miguel de las Cuevas during his time at Sporting Gijon.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Fight Night: Kape vs. Horiguchi - Main
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: A crucial matchup between flyweight contenders headlines UFC's return to action at the Meta APEX in Las Vegas on Saturday, June 21 as second-ranked contender Manel “Starboy” Kape faces off with fifthranked Kyoji Horiguchi. A winner of seven of his last eight appearances and each of his last three outings, Kape makes his 2026 debut off a first-round knockout win over former title challenger Brandon Royval last December in the same building. A title challenger during his first stint with the promotion, Horiuchi has earned back-to-back wins since returning to the UFC last November and looks to cement his standing as a contender with a third straight standout performance.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: LALIGA TOP GOALS MIGUEL DE LAS CUEVAS - LALIGA TOP GOALS MIGUEL DE LAS CUEVAS
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: Some of the best goals from Miguel de las Cuevas during his time at Sporting Gijon.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: TM ISTAF World Cup 2026 - Group - MYANMAR vs MALAYSIA - (TEAM)
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: The ISTAF Sepaktakraw World Cup 2026 marks the official return of the Sepaktakraw World Cup to Malaysia, reaffirming the nation's historic and enduring role in the global development of the sport. This prestigious championship will be held from 16 to 23 May 2026 in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia.
